payload.title: Update persona-picker product guide with current persona IDs and names
payload.description: fenix-journal/guides/persona-picker.md still lists old persona IDs (engineer, pm, designer) and an old 6-persona cast from an earlier iteration. Needs to be updated to match the current cast: evaluator (Merritt Hunter), seeker (Phil Thevoid), practitioner (Drew Skematics), learner (Paige Turner), technologist (Ray Turing), innercircle (Keshav Shivdasani). The docs/PERSONA-PICKER.md was updated Mar 23 but the product guide diverges more deeply.
